---
title: "HTHH Impacts analysis"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
date: "2026-03-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================================
# HTHH_Impacts_Paper_V5
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

# ---- 0) PROJECT PATHS (EDIT ONCE) ------------------------------------------
paths <- list(
  data_dir = ".",            # Fish_Data.xlsx, Benthic_Data.csv, Target_families.csv, Fishing_Pressure.csv
  fits_dir = "fits",         # cached brms model .rds
  fig_dir  = "figures"       # exported figures
)

dir.create(paths$fits_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(paths$fig_dir,  showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

```


```{r}
# ---- 1) PACKAGES + OPTIONS -------------------------------------------------
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(readr)
  library(readxl)
  library(lubridate)
  library(geosphere)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(scales)
  library(janitor)
  library(brms)
  library(bayesplot)
  library(patchwork)
  library(sf)
  library(rnaturalearth)
  library(ggspatial)
  library(tidybayes)
})

options(mc.cores = parallel::detectCores())
```


```{r}
# ---- 2) THEME + HELPERS ----------------------------------------------------
base_family <- if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  suppressWarnings(windowsFonts(sans = windowsFont("Arial")))
  "sans"
} else {
  "sans"
}

theme_nature <- function(base_size = 6) {
  theme_classic(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      text = element_text(family = base_family),
      axis.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.text  = element_text(size = base_size),
      axis.line  = element_line(linewidth = 0.4),
      axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.4),
      legend.title = element_text(size = base_size),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = base_size),
      legend.key.size = unit(3, "mm"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = base_size + 1, face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(4, 4, 4, 4, unit = "mm")
    )
}

fit_or_load_brm <- function(path, formula, data, family, prior,
                            chains = 4, iter = 4000,
                            control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 15),
                            seed = 123) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    readRDS(path)
  } else {
    fit <- brm(
      formula = formula,
      data = data,
      family = family,
      prior = prior,
      chains = chains,
      iter = iter,
      control = control,
      seed = seed
    )
    saveRDS(fit, path)
    fit
  }
}

summarise_epred <- function(pred, newdata) {
  stopifnot(ncol(pred) == nrow(newdata))
  newdata %>%
    mutate(
      pred_median = apply(pred, 2, median),
      lower = apply(pred, 2, quantile, probs = 0.025),
      upper = apply(pred, 2, quantile, probs = 0.975)
    )
}

unscale <- function(x_sc, x_raw) x_sc * sd(x_raw, na.rm = TRUE) + mean(x_raw, na.rm = TRUE)

export_fig <- function(fig, filename_base, width_mm, height_mm, dpi = 600) {
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(paths$fig_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".pdf")),
    plot = fig,
    width = width_mm, height = height_mm, units = "mm",
    device = cairo_pdf
  )
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(paths$fig_dir, paste0(filename_base, ".png")),
    plot = fig,
    width = width_mm, height = height_mm, units = "mm",
    dpi = dpi, bg = "white"
  )
  invisible(TRUE)
}
```


```{r}
# ---- 3) READ RAW DATA ------------------------------------------------------
Fish    <- read_excel(file.path(paths$data_dir, "Fish_Data.xlsx"))
Benthic <- read_csv(file.path(paths$data_dir, "Benthic_Data.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
Target_families <- read_csv(file.path(paths$data_dir, "Target_families.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
fp <- read_csv(file.path(paths$data_dir, "Fishing_Pressure.csv"),
               col_types = cols(Lat = col_double(), Long = col_double(), FP.null = col_double()))
```


```{r}
# ---- 4) BENTHIC: CLEAN → TRANSECT % COVER ---------------------------------
Benthic_clean <- Benthic %>%
  select(site_name, site_country_region, survey_title, survey_transect_number,
         `survey_start_date (UTC)`, point_machine_classification,
         point_machine_group_code, point_machine_benthic_code) %>%
  mutate(survey_year = year(ymd_hms(`survey_start_date (UTC)`)))

transect_group <- Benthic_clean %>%
  group_by(site_name, site_country_region, survey_title,
           survey_transect_number, survey_year, point_machine_group_code) %>%
  summarise(n_points = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(site_name, site_country_region, survey_title, survey_transect_number, survey_year) %>%
  mutate(percent_cover = 100 * n_points / sum(n_points)) %>%
  ungroup()

transect_group_wide <- transect_group %>%
  mutate(point_machine_group_code = na_if(point_machine_group_code, "")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(point_machine_group_code)) %>%
  select(site_name, site_country_region, survey_title, survey_transect_number,
         survey_year, point_machine_group_code, percent_cover) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = point_machine_group_code,
              values_from = percent_cover,
              values_fill = 0) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(total_percent_cover = sum(c_across(-c(site_name, site_country_region,
                                               survey_title, survey_transect_number,
                                               survey_year)),
                                   na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()
```



```{r}
# ---- 5) FISH: TRANSECT METRICS --------------------------------------------
Fish_transect <- Fish %>%
  mutate(
    is_target = `Fish family` %in% Target_families$Family,
    is_target_gt15 = is_target & Size > 15
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    Country, Site, Latitude, Longitude, Exposure,
    `Reef slope`, `Reef type`, `Reef zone`,
    Year, Depth,
    `Management name`, `Management secondary name`,
    `Management year established`, `Management size`, `Management rules`,
    `Transect number`, Observers
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    total_biomass = sum(`Biomass kg/ha`, na.rm = TRUE),
    target_biomass = sum(`Biomass kg/ha`[is_target], na.rm = TRUE),
    target_gt15_biomass = sum(`Biomass kg/ha`[is_target_gt15], na.rm = TRUE),
    species_diversity = n_distinct(`Fish taxon`),
    avg_trophic_level = mean(`Trophic level`, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_vulnerability = mean(Vulnerability, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}
# ---- 6) MERGE BENTHIC + FISH ----------------------------------------------
transect_full <- transect_group_wide %>%
  left_join(Fish_transect,
            by = c("site_name" = "Site",
                   "survey_transect_number" = "Transect number",
                   "survey_year" = "Year"))
```


```{r}
# ---- 7) ADD FISHING PRESSURE (ROUND LAT/LON TO 4 dp) ----------------------
fp_key <- fp %>%
  transmute(lat4 = round(Lat, 4), lon4 = round(Long, 4), fp_null = FP.null) %>%
  distinct(lat4, lon4, .keep_all = TRUE)

transect_full <- transect_full %>%
  mutate(lat4 = round(Latitude, 4), lon4 = round(Longitude, 4)) %>%
  left_join(fp_key, by = c("lat4", "lon4"))
```


```{r}
# ---- 8) CLEAN NAMES + MANAGEMENT FIXES -------------------------------------
transect_full <- transect_full %>%
  mutate(
    pre_post = case_when(
      survey_year < 2022 ~ "pre",
      survey_year > 2022 ~ "post",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    `Management secondary name` = case_when(
      `Management secondary name` %in% c("Fish Habitat Reserve (FHR)", "Fish Habitat Reserve") ~ "Fish Habitat Reserve",
      TRUE ~ `Management secondary name`
    )
  ) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    management_secondary_name = case_when(
      management_name %in% c("Holopeka SMA", "Faleloa SMA", "Koulo SMA") ~ "Special Management Area",
      management_name == "Faleloa FHR" ~ "Fish Habitat Reserve",
      TRUE ~ management_secondary_name
    ),
    management_year_established = case_when(
      management_name %in% c("Holopeka SMA", "Faleloa SMA", "Faleloa FHR", "Koulo SMA") ~ 2017,
      TRUE ~ management_year_established
    )
  )
```


```{r}
# ---- 9) DISTANCE FROM EPICENTRE -------------------------------------------
ref_lat <- -20.544359
ref_lon <- -175.390260

transect_full <- transect_full %>%
  mutate(
    distance_km = distHaversine(c(ref_lon, ref_lat), cbind(longitude, latitude)) / 1000
  )
```


```{r}
# ---- 10) FILTER: ONLY SITES WITH BOTH PRE & POST ---------------------------
sites_with_both <- transect_full %>%
  filter(!is.na(pre_post)) %>%
  group_by(site_name) %>%
  filter(all(c("pre", "post") %in% pre_post)) %>%
  ungroup()
```


```{r}
# ---- 11) TRANSECT CHANGE DATA ---------------------------------------------
transect_covariates <- sites_with_both %>%
  group_by(site_name, survey_transect_number) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_depth = mean(depth, na.rm = TRUE),
    distance_km = mean(distance_km, na.rm = TRUE),
    latitude = first(latitude),
    longitude = first(longitude),
    site_country_region = first(site_country_region),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

transect_prepost <- sites_with_both %>%
  group_by(site_name, survey_transect_number, site_country_region, pre_post) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_coral = mean(hard_coral, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_biomass = mean(total_biomass, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

transect_change <- transect_prepost %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = pre_post, values_from = c(mean_coral, mean_biomass)) %>%
  mutate(
    coral_change = mean_coral_post - mean_coral_pre,
    biomass_change = mean_biomass_post - mean_biomass_pre
  ) %>%
  left_join(transect_covariates, by = c("site_name", "survey_transect_number"))
```


```{r}
# ---- 12) MODEL DATASETS (SCALED) -------------------------------------------
sites_with_both_sc <- sites_with_both %>%
  mutate(
    pre_post = factor(pre_post, levels = c("pre", "post")),
    distance_sc = scale(distance_km)[, 1],
    depth_sc    = scale(depth)[, 1],
    coral_prop  = pmin(pmax(hard_coral / 100, 0.001), 0.999),
    log_biomass = log1p(total_biomass),
    target_biomass_log1p = log1p(target_biomass),
    fp_prop = pmin(pmax(fp_null / 100, 0.001), 0.999),
    fp_sc = scale(qlogis(fp_prop))[, 1]
  )

transect_change_sc <- transect_change %>%
  mutate(
    mean_depth_sc = scale(mean_depth)[, 1],
    distance_sc   = scale(distance_km)[, 1]
  )
```


```{r}
# ---- 13) SIMPLE DISTRIBUTION FIGURES --------------------------------------
Benthic_violin <- ggplot(sites_with_both_sc, aes(pre_post, hard_coral, fill = pre_post)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.25, width = 0.15,
              size = 1, alpha = 0.20) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(pre = "Pre-Eruption", post = "Post-Eruption")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(pre = "#1F5AA6", post = "#E07A5F"), guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Time period", y = "Hard coral cover (%)") +
  theme_nature()

trgtbm_violin <- ggplot(sites_with_both_sc, aes(pre_post, target_biomass, fill = pre_post)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, trim = FALSE) +
  geom_jitter(shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.25, width = 0.15,
              size = 1, alpha = 0.20) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(pre = "Pre-Eruption", post = "Post-Eruption")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(pre = "#1F5AA6", post = "#E07A5F"), guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Time period", y = "Target species biomass (kg/ha)") +
  theme_nature()
```



```{r}
# ---- 14) MODELS: CORAL (BETA) + CORAL CHANGE (GAUSSIAN SPLINE) ------------
##CORAL MODEL
coral_priors <- c(
  prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b"),
  prior(student_t(3, 0, 2.5), class = "Intercept"),
  prior(exponential(1), class = "sd")
)

coral_model_prepost <- fit_or_load_brm(
  path = file.path(paths$fits_dir, "coral_model_prepost.rds"),
  formula = coral_prop ~ pre_post * distance_sc + depth_sc + (1 + pre_post | site_name),
  data = sites_with_both_sc,
  family = Beta(),
  prior = coral_priors,
  iter = 4000,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 15)
)

summary(coral_model_prepost)

newdata_coral <- crossing(
  distance_sc = seq(min(sites_with_both_sc$distance_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                    max(sites_with_both_sc$distance_sc, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100),
  pre_post = factor(c("pre", "post"), levels = c("pre", "post"))
) %>% mutate(depth_sc = mean(sites_with_both_sc$depth_sc, na.rm = TRUE))

pred_coral <- posterior_epred(coral_model_prepost, newdata = newdata_coral, re_formula = NA)
coral_pred <- summarise_epred(pred_coral, newdata_coral) %>%
  mutate(distance_km = unscale(distance_sc, sites_with_both_sc$distance_km))

coral_model_fig <- ggplot(coral_pred, aes(distance_km, pred_median, color = pre_post, fill = pre_post)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25), labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(pre = "#1F5AA6", post = "#E07A5F"), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(pre = "#1F5AA6", post = "#E07A5F"), guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "Distance from eruption (km)", y = "Predicted coral cover (%)") +
  theme_nature()

##CORAL CHANGE MODEL
coral_change_priors <- c(
  prior(normal(0, 0.5), class = "b"),
  prior(normal(0, 2), class = "Intercept"),
  prior(exponential(2), class = "sds"),
  prior(exponential(2), class = "sd"),
  prior(exponential(2), class = "sigma")
)

coral_change_model_spline <- fit_or_load_brm(
  path = file.path(paths$fits_dir, "coral_change_model_spline.rds"),
  formula = coral_change ~ s(distance_sc) + mean_depth_sc + (1 | site_name),
  data = transect_change_sc,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior = coral_change_priors,
  iter = 6000,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 15)
)

newdata_coralchg <- tibble(
  distance_sc = seq(min(transect_change_sc$distance_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                    max(transect_change_sc$distance_sc, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 200),
  mean_depth_sc = mean(transect_change_sc$mean_depth_sc, na.rm = TRUE)
)

pred_coralchg <- posterior_epred(coral_change_model_spline, newdata = newdata_coralchg, re_formula = NA)
coralchg_pred <- summarise_epred(pred_coralchg, newdata_coralchg) %>%
  mutate(distance_km = unscale(distance_sc, transect_change_sc$distance_km))

site_means_coral <- transect_change_sc %>%
  group_by(site_name, site_country_region.x) %>%
  summarise(distance_km = mean(distance_km, na.rm = TRUE),
            coral_change = mean(coral_change, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

coral_change_model_fig <- ggplot(coralchg_pred, aes(distance_km, pred_median)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, fill = "grey70") +
  geom_point(data = site_means_coral,
             aes(x = distance_km, y = coral_change, color = factor(site_country_region.x,
                                                                 levels = c("Vavau", "Haapai", "Tongatapu"))),
             inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0.3, size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Vavau" = "#C9A227", "Haapai" = "#7B4FA3", "Tongatapu" = "#2A9D8F"),
                     labels = c("Vavau" = "Vava'u", "Haapai" = "Ha'apai", "Tongatapu" = "Tongatapu"),
                     name = "Island Group") +
  labs(x = "Distance from eruption (km)", y = "Change in coral cover (%)") +
  theme_nature()

```

```{r}
# ---- 15) MANAGEMENT: No-take vs Open (ALL FHR ANALYSIS, WITH fp_sc) --------
# Toggle: choose whether the time×management figure uses model predictions
# TRUE  = posterior credible intervals from FPallFHR_model
# FALSE = raw mean ± 1.96*SE on back-transformed biomass
use_predicted_time_mgmt <- FALSE

sites_allFHR <- sites_with_both_sc %>%
  mutate(
    management_secondary_name = case_when(
      management_secondary_name %in% c("Open", "Special Management Area") ~ "Open",
      management_secondary_name == "Fish Habitat Reserve" ~ "No-Take",
      TRUE ~ management_secondary_name
    ),
    management_secondary_name = factor(management_secondary_name, levels = c("No-Take", "Open"))
  )

FPallFHR_model <- fit_or_load_brm(
  path = file.path(paths$fits_dir, "FPallFHR_model.rds"),
  formula = target_biomass_log1p ~ distance_sc * pre_post * management_secondary_name + depth_sc + fp_sc + (1 | site_name),
  data = sites_allFHR,
  family = gaussian(),
  prior = bm_priors,
  iter = 4000,
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95, max_treedepth = 15)
)

summary(FPallFHR_model)

# (A.1) Time × management Raw Data Plot
.time_mgmt_raw <- function(df) {
  df_plot <- df %>%
    filter(management_secondary_name %in% c("No-Take", "Open")) %>%
    mutate(
      pre_post = factor(pre_post, levels = c("pre", "post"),
                        labels = c("Pre-Eruption", "Post-Eruption")),
      management_secondary_name = factor(management_secondary_name, levels = c("No-Take", "Open")),
      biomass_bt = expm1(target_biomass_log1p)
    )

  sum_df <- df_plot %>%
    group_by(management_secondary_name, pre_post) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_bt = mean(biomass_bt, na.rm = TRUE),
      se_bt   = sd(biomass_bt, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(biomass_bt))),
      lower   = mean_bt - 1.96 * se_bt,
      upper   = mean_bt + 1.96 * se_bt,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(lower = pmax(lower, 0))

  ggplot(sum_df,
         aes(x = pre_post, y = mean_bt,
             group = management_secondary_name,
             color = management_secondary_name)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.10, linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(size = 1.6) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("No-Take" = "#2E8B57", "Open" = "#1F5AA6"), name = "") +
    labs(x = "Time period", y = "Target species biomass (kg/ha)") +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = "sqrt") +
    theme_nature(base_size = 5) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.80, 0.80))
}

# (A.2) Time × management Predcited Data Plot
.time_mgmt_pred <- function(model, df) {
  nd <- crossing(
    pre_post = factor(c("pre", "post"), levels = c("pre", "post")),
    management_secondary_name = factor(c("No-Take", "Open"), levels = c("No-Take", "Open"))
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      distance_sc = mean(df$distance_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
      depth_sc    = mean(df$depth_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
      fp_sc       = mean(df$fp_sc, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

  p <- posterior_epred(model, newdata = nd, re_formula = NA)
  p_bt <- expm1(p)

  sum_df <- nd %>%
    mutate(
      mean_bt = apply(p_bt, 2, median),
      lower   = apply(p_bt, 2, quantile, 0.025),
      upper   = apply(p_bt, 2, quantile, 0.975),
      pre_post = factor(pre_post, levels = c("pre", "post"),
                        labels = c("Pre-Eruption", "Post-Eruption"))
    ) %>%
    mutate(lower = pmax(lower, 0))

  ggplot(sum_df,
         aes(x = pre_post, y = mean_bt,
             group = management_secondary_name,
             color = management_secondary_name)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.10, linewidth = 0.6) +
    geom_point(size = 1.6) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("No-Take" = "#2E8B57", "Open" = "#1F5AA6"), name = "") +
    labs(x = "Time period", y = "Target species biomass (kg/ha)") +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = "sqrt") +
    theme_nature(base_size = 5) +
    theme(legend.position = c(0.80, 0.80))
}

if (isTRUE(use_predicted_time_mgmt)) {
  time_mgmt_fig <- .time_mgmt_pred(FPallFHR_model, sites_allFHR)
} else {
  time_mgmt_fig <- .time_mgmt_raw(sites_allFHR)
}

# (B) Management with Distance
newdata_allFHR <- crossing(
  distance_sc = seq(min(sites_allFHR$distance_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
                    max(sites_allFHR$distance_sc, na.rm = TRUE), length.out = 100),
  pre_post = factor(c("pre", "post"), levels = c("pre", "post")),
  management_secondary_name = factor(c("No-Take", "Open"), levels = c("No-Take", "Open"))
) %>% mutate(
  depth_sc = mean(sites_allFHR$depth_sc, na.rm = TRUE),
  fp_sc = mean(sites_allFHR$fp_sc, na.rm = TRUE)
)

pred_allFHR <- posterior_epred(FPallFHR_model, newdata = newdata_allFHR, re_formula = NA)
allFHR_pred <- summarise_epred(pred_allFHR, newdata_allFHR) %>%
  mutate(distance_km = unscale(distance_sc, sites_allFHR$distance_km))

allFHR_fig <- ggplot(allFHR_pred, aes(x = distance_km, y = pred_median)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = pre_post), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_line(aes(color = pre_post), linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_point(data = sites_allFHR,
             aes(x = distance_km, y = target_biomass_log1p, color = pre_post, fill = pre_post),
             inherit.aes = FALSE, shape = 21, size = 0.5, alpha = 0.3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(pre = "#1F5AA6", post = "#E07A5F"),
                     labels = c(pre = "Pre-Eruption", post = "Post-Eruption"), name = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(pre = "#1F5AA6", post = "#E07A5F"), guide = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(3.5, 9)) +
  labs(x = "Distance from eruption (km)", y = "log Target species biomass (kg/ha)") +
  facet_grid(. ~ management_secondary_name,
             labeller = labeller(management_secondary_name = c("No-Take" = "No-take", "Open" = "Open"))) +
  theme_nature(base_size = 5) +
  theme(
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "cm"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.position = c(0.85, 0.16)
  )

```


```{r}
# ---- 16) MAPS --------------------------------------------------------------
# Epicentre + rings

epic_lon <- -175.388031

epic_lat <- -20.534010

epic_sf <- st_as_sf(data.frame(name = "Epicentre", lon = epic_lon, lat = epic_lat),
                    coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)

epic_utm <- st_transform(epic_sf, 32701)

r_km <- seq(50, 250, by = 50)

rings_sf <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_along(r_km), function(i) {
  st_sf(r_km = r_km[i], geometry = st_geometry(st_buffer(epic_utm, dist = r_km[i] * 1000)))
}))

rings_sf <- st_transform(rings_sf, 4326)

# Tonga outline
tonga <- rnaturalearth::ne_countries(scale = "medium", country = "Tonga", returnclass = "sf")
fmt_w <- function(x) paste0(abs(x), "° W")
fmt_s <- function(y) paste0(abs(y), "° S")

# Overall sites map
sites_sf <- st_as_sf(transect_change, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

map_fig <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = tonga, fill = "#1F4D1F", color = "grey35", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_sf(data = rings_sf, fill = NA, color = "#F4A996", alpha = 0.5,
          linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_sf(data = epic_sf, shape = 24, size = 3.2, fill = "black", color = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = epic_lon, y = epic_lat - 0.08, label = "Epicentre",
           size = 2.6, family = base_family) +
  geom_sf(data = sites_sf, shape = 21, fill = "#F2D16B", color = "black",
          size = 2.5, alpha = 0.4) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-175.7, -173.9), ylim = c(-21.5, -18.5), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = fmt_w) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = fmt_s) +
  labs(title = "Kingdom of Tonga", x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey95", linewidth = 0.2),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.7),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "plain")
  ) +
  annotation_scale(location = "br", width_hint = 0.22, text_cex = 0.7) +
  annotation_north_arrow(location = "br", which_north = "true",
                         style = north_arrow_fancy_orienteering,
                         height = unit(1.0, "cm"), width = unit(1.0, "cm"))
```


```{r}
# ---- 17) COMBINED FIGURES --------------------------------------------------
combined_benthic_fig <-
  (Benthic_violin | coral_model_fig | coral_change_model_fig) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

combined_FHR_fig <-
  (trgtbm_violin | time_mgmt_fig) /
  allFHR_fig +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

combined_benthic_fig
combined_FHR_fig

```


```{r}
# ---- 18) EXPORTS -----------------------------------------------------------
export_fig(map_fig, "map_fig", width_mm = 90, height_mm = 60)
export_fig(combined_benthic_fig, "Benthic_combined_doublecol", width_mm = 180, height_mm = 180)
export_fig(allFHR_fig, "allFHR_fig", width_mm = 180, height_mm = 110)
export_fig(time_mgmt_fig, "time_mgmt_fig", width_mm = 90, height_mm = 90)
export_fig(combined_FHR_fig, "combined_FHR_fig", width_mm = 160, height_mm = 120)

# Export as double-column width (Nature ~180 mm)
ggsave(
  "combined_FHR_fig.pdf",
  plot   = combined_FHR_fig,
  width  = 90 / 25.4,   # double column width
  height = 90 / 25.4,   # adjust if you want a flatter/taller layout
  device = cairo_pdf
)

# Export as double-column width PNG (Nature ~180 mm)
ggsave(
  filename = "combined_FHR_fig.png",
  plot     = combined_FHR_fig,
  width    = 90 / 25.4,   # double column width (inches)
  height   = 90 / 25.4,    # adjust as needed
  units    = "in",
  dpi      = 300,
  bg       = "white"
)
```
